sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_efc1ee6a987732107f44ab4eb33b8bed
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>false</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>incident</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="incident">service_offering=7e845b6dc17332107f442963ae1ebdd4^priority=1^EQ<item display_table="service_offering" display_value="Infinity(HHD)" endquery="false" field="service_offering" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="7e845b6dc17332107f442963ae1ebdd4"/><item display_value="1 - Critical" endquery="false" field="priority" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="1"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>populate manufacturer contact name</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

	// Add your code here

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-26 09:12:02</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>efc1ee6a987732107f44ab4eb33b8bed</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>populate manufacturer contact name</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_efc1ee6a987732107f44ab4eb33b8bed</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-26 09:18:07</sys_updated_on><template>u_manufacturer_contactSAMEASservice_offering.manufacturer.contact^EQ</template><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=efc1ee6a987732107f44ab4eb33b8bed"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ui_policy_c28ede66987732107f44ab4eb33b8b24
sys_update_xml.payload:
truepriority=1^service_offering=7e845b6dc17332107f442963ae1ebdd4^EQtruefalsetruetrue100truefalseDisplay Escalation for Infinity (HHD) service offerings when Priority = 1 - Criticalsys_ui_policyadmin2026-03-26 08:55:09global/c28ede66987732107f44ab4eb33b8b240Display Escalation for Infinity (HHD) service offerings when Priority = 1 - Criticalglobalglobalsys_ui_policy_c28ede66987732107f44ab4eb33b8b24admin2026-03-26 08:55:09incident
0
sys_update_xml.target_name: Display Escalation for Infinity (HHD) service offerings when Priority = 1 - Critical

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_4171ee6a987732107f44ab4eb33b8b23
sys_update_xml.payload:
falsepackage_privatefalsetruefalsetruetruetruefalsefalsefalseincidentfalseservice_offering=7e845b6dc17332107f442963ae1ebdd4^u_escalate_to_manufacturer=true^EQfalseReminder: To escalate to manufacturer, send mail to Manufacturer contact.
